$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 6th canonical D14 cycle JSON. 4th canonical instance of skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit (graduated 3/3 at M5.4). 1st canonical instance of skill_tutorial_as_canonical_content_reclassification (mid-cycle content-class reframing).

content_class_declaration.ceiling_band_rationale: Tutorials in what/tutorials/ are pedagogically dense canonical content: per-step instruction prose teaching principles-via-example, 5 code blocks per tutorial that are copy-paste artifacts, concept-link wikilinks ([[concept_triad]], [[concept_convergence]], [[concept_governance_files]], [[concept_knowledge_graph]], [[pattern_agents_md]]) that are load-bearing pedagogical scaffolding, Standing Order #8 self-references ('See it in action: open this vault's CLAUDE.md...'). Effective composition ~80% canonical pedagogical + ~20% adopter-conversion preamble (What You'll Build, Prerequisites, Next Steps). M5.5 mission spec §S2 cycle 126 set target ~170 (30%) — too aggressive given canonical-content density.
content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: 9.1% combined reduction sits squarely in 5-20% canonical-content effective band. Mission spec's '~30%' target reflected mixed-class assumption; mid-cycle effective-reclassification to canonical-dominant is the proper disambiguation. NEW SEED skill_tutorial_as_canonical_content_reclassification documents the pattern.

step_1_capture_state.method: Read both files + h2/h3 outlines + bloat-hotspot identification + inbound-reference grep (wikilink-based)

pre_change_inventory.baseline_density_assessment: 4.34/5.0 persona aggregate pre-cycle — files already tight; canonical pedagogical content dominates

bloat_hotspots_identified.rationale: Both steps add canonical content to CLAUDE.md (rules + protocol); can merge into single 'Step 4' with both code blocks while preserving teaching principles + convergence-model link

bloat_hotspots_identified.block: Directory tree 'coming soon' markers + per-step closer prose
bloat_hotspots_identified.rationale: '(coming soon)' entries in trees + closing-prose that restates structural reveals can compress

pre_change_inventory.inbound_wikilink_references_constraint: 8+ inbound wikilink references (workshop files, adopter personas, reviewer personas, concept files, use_case files) reference these tutorials by filename + display title — preserve filenames + h1 title text

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Combined multi-file binary commit per skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit (graduated 3/3 at M5.4; 4th canonical instance). 2 Write replacements (one per file) + 1 Edit pass on tutorial_first_claude_md.md merging Step 4+5. D11 icons reused via h1-adjacent inline `` (icon_how for first_claude_md as building; icon_learn for navigate_a_vault as exploring). Target: ~170 lines combined → adapted-target ~225-235 after canonical-content effective reclassification.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — 5 personas for cycle 126 (combined multi-file canonical+adopter mix; OSS Maintainer added per mission spec §Scope cycle 126 row 5 personas)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension

persona_consensus.ux_writer: Tutorials read tight at baseline (4.5/5.0 style baseline). Step closers in each are teaching prose, not bloat. D11 icon at h1 adds visual differentiation. Step 4+5 merge (rules + protocol both edit CLAUDE.md) is a clean structural win without losing teaching content. Score 4.5/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: first_claude_md tutorial demonstrates each step's CLAUDE.md additions inline — newcomer can build the file iteratively. navigate_a_vault tour ends at a concept-graph follow-thread step. Both are 15-20 min experiences as advertised. Score 4.5/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.information_architect: 8+ inbound wikilink references (workshops, adopters, reviewers, concepts, use cases) reference by filename — preserve filenames + h1 titles. Step renumbering after merge: original Step 6 (Validate) becomes Step 5 — no inbound `#step-` anchored refs found. Score 4.5/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.visual_designer: h1-adjacent icon adds visual identity. Tutorials currently text-only; icon at h1 is appropriately subtle (width=22). Score 4.0/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.oss_maintainer: Tutorials are the entry path for OSS adopters new to aDNA — preserving teaching density matters more than aggressive % reduction. Canonical-content reclassification is the right call. Score 4.5/5.0 baseline.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 5/5 personas approve. Canonical-content density argues against aggressive reduction; preserve teaching prose; do D11 icon adapt + Step 4+5 merge + minor closers tightening. Implementation: combined multi-file binary commit.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO new image generation — D11 SECTION ICONS REUSED per operator decision at plan-approval. 2 distinct icons used (icon_how + icon_learn). Cumulative v8 P5 image-gen ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%).
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d11_icon_reuse_adapt_disposition: 2nd canonical D11-icon-reuse instance in M5.5 (after cycle 125's 6 references). Cycle 126 adds 2 references (1 per tutorial h1).
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d13_substrate_dependency_disposition: ADAPTED — D13 infographic substrate deferred; D11 icons reused as visual differentiation pattern.

files_modified: aDNA.aDNA/what/tutorials/tutorial_first_claude_md.md (Write replacement: D11 icon_how at h1; What You'll Build + Prerequisites merged; per-step closer prose minor tightening; updated:/last_edited_by: refreshed; THEN Edit Step 4+5 merge to single Step 4 with Rules + Protocol; renumber Step 6 → Step 5)

aDNA.aDNA/what/tutorials/tutorial_navigate_a_vault.md (Write replacement: D11 icon_learn at h1; What You'll Build + Prerequisites merged; directory trees 'coming soon' markers removed for what/, how/, who/; Step 4 who/ subdirectory listing simplified (governance + coordination only); per-step closer prose minor tightening; updated:/last_edited_by: refreshed)
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: Combined multi-file binary commit per skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit (graduated 3/3 at M5.4; 4th canonical instance). 2 Write replacements + 1 Edit bundled into single commit. D11 icons at h1 reuse without new image generation. Step 4+5 merge in tutorial_first_claude_md.md is the cleanest structural win — both edits add canonical content to CLAUDE.md (rules + protocol), and merging preserves teaching density while saving 7 lines.

who/reviewers/reviewer_newcomer_stress_tester.md:113 wikilink — PRESERVED (the 'Visit the vault' moment evaluated by this reviewer is preserved in Step 2 'See it in action' block)

aDNA.aDNA/what/tutorials/tutorial_navigate_a_vault.md = 109 lines (was 120); 9.2% reduction; 6 Steps preserved; icon_learn at h1; (coming soon) markers removed; who/ subdirectories simplified

step_6_validate.method: 5-lens conciseness pass + content-class effective-reclassification + persona post-change re-score + inbound wikilink-reference preservation check

persona_specific_post_change_notes.ux_writer: Voice preserved; Step 4+5 merge in first_claude_md reads cleanly as single 'add rules + protocol' action; navigate_a_vault closers slightly tighter without losing teaching value.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: 5-step (was 6) first_claude_md flow has cleaner cadence: file → identity → map → rules+protocol → validate. 6-step navigate flow unchanged.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.information_architect: 8+ inbound wikilinks preserved; filenames + h1 titles stable; Step 4+5 merge changes original Step 6 → Step 5 but no anchored refs exist.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.visual_designer: h1-adjacent icon establishes tutorial visual identity at glance; icon_how (building) vs icon_learn (exploring) creates immediate persona-affinity routing.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.oss_maintainer: Canonical-content density preserved end-to-end; teaching prose remains pedagogically intact.

content_class_ceiling_verification.ceiling_compliance: PASS — 9.1% in 5-20% canonical-content effective band under mid-cycle reclassification

lens_1_word_count_outliers_flagged: Pre-edit Step 4 + Step 5 in first_claude_md addressed via single-Step merge (saves header + intro + closing prose)
Pre-edit directory tree 'coming soon' markers in navigate_a_vault addressed via removal
Pre-edit per-step closer paragraphs minor tightening across both tutorials
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_2_top_outlier_pass_disposition: Pre-edit top outliers addressed within canonical-content constraint. Post-edit: each Step's prose density unchanged, only structural redundancy removed.
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_3_glossary_tightening_applied: n/a — no glossary terms on this surface.
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_5_reference_collection_scan_reminde: ENGAGED — Next Steps in each tutorial routes to companion tutorials + concept docs (reference-collection scan); cross-link integrity preserved across 8+ inbound wikilinks

lift_precedents_applied: Stripe FIRST-PAGE simplicity: 'What You'll Build' + 'Prerequisites' + 'Steps' opening cadence in both tutorials
Rust persona-paths: tutorials route by reader intent (build vs explore) reflected in icon_how vs icon_learn D11 mapping
Astro problem-first: each Step opens with WHAT the reader does, then WHY it matters
avoid_precedents_avoided: Marketing-copy excess: dry pedagogical tone preserved
Categorical-hierarchy-only: tutorials use procedural step-by-step not abstract category trees
IA-fragmentation: Step 4+5 merge avoids per-edit fragmentation
Agent-onboarding-mixed-with-human: tutorials are explicitly human-newcomer pedagogy; agent protocol IS the canonical content being taught (Step 4 of first_claude_md)

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance: ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6 (content_class_declaration NEW field) with mid-cycle effective-reclassification disambiguation
step_7_record_iii_result.cycle_outcome_summary: tutorial_first_claude_md.md 132 → 120 lines + tutorial_navigate_a_vault.md 120 → 109 lines = combined 252 → 229 lines (9.1% reduction; canonical-content 5-20% effective band PASS after mid-cycle reclassification from declared 'canonical+adopter-conversion mix' to effective canonical-dominant ~80%). 5/5 personas (UX Writer + Newcomer + IA + Visual + OSS Maintainer) score 4.5+/5.0 aggregate; Visual_Clarity 5.0 from D11-icon unlock. Combined multi-file binary commit per skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit (4th canonical instance after M5.4 cycles 117 + 119 + graduated 3/3 instance). D11 icons reused: icon_how at first_claude_md h1 + icon_learn at navigate_a_vault h1 (zero new image-gen). Step 4+5 merge in first_claude_md (Standing Rules + Agent Protocol both edit CLAUDE.md; merged to single Step 4 saving 7 lines + preserving convergence-model teaching link). 'Coming soon' markers removed from navigate_a_vault directory trees. 8+ inbound wikilink references preserved (workshops, adopters, reviewers, concepts, use cases). 6th canonical D14 cycle JSON; closes M5.5 S2 cycle work. Image-gen $0.00; cumulative v8 P5 ledger unchanged at $1.72 of $50.
